content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta/test language WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 uses user-visible label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag user-facing "Experimental"/"unstable" language as signaling an unfinished feature shipped to production, even though metadata and release notes are clean. Consider rewording to something like "New feature — you can turn this off anytime" to avoid implying instability, or move any true caveats to release notes phrased more confidently.
